info.description:
This is the API for the Don't Look Up Hackathon project.
It allows users to track comets by submitting observations and calculating their orbits.
info.title: Comet Tracker API

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password, and sets a session_id cookie upon success.
Invalidates the current user's session by clearing the session_id cookie.

400.description: No active session to log out

post.description: Creates a new user account. Can accept 'application/json' or 'multipart/form-data' if an avatar is being uploaded.

400.description: Invalid request body or required fields are missing

409.description: User with this email or username already exists

get.description: Retrieves a single orbital calculation result by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a calculation result by its ID.

parameters.description: ID of the calculation to delete
parameters.name: calculation_id

get.description: Retrieves a list of all comets owned by the authenticated user.
get.summary: List all comets for the current user

post.description: Creates a new comet entry associated with the authenticated user.

400.description: Invalid request body or name is required

get.description: Retrieves the history of all orbital calculations performed for a specific comet.
get.summary: List calculation history for a comet

post.description: Starts a new orbit calculation for a given comet using a specified list of observation IDs. Requires at least 5 observations.

parameters.description: List of observation IDs to use for calculation
parameters.name: observation_ids

400.description: Invalid input, e.g., not enough observations or an observation does not belong to the comet

404.description: Comet or one of the observations not found

get.description: Retrieves all observation records for a specific comet.
get.summary: List all observations for a comet

post.description: Adds a new observation record to a specific comet. Can accept JSON or multipart/form-data for image uploads.
post.summary: Create an observation for a comet

parameters.description: ID of the comet to add observation to
parameters.name: comet_id

parameters.description: Observation timestamp in RFC3339 format (if using multipart)
parameters.name: observed_at

parameters.description: Right Ascension in degrees (if using multipart)
parameters.name: right_ascension

parameters.description: Notes about the observation (if using multipart)
parameters.name: notes

parameters.description: Image of the observation (if using multipart)
parameters.name: image

400.description: Invalid request data or comet ID

get.description: Retrieves a specific comet by its ID. User must be the owner.

put.description: Updates a comet's name and/or description. User must be the owner.

400.description: Invalid comet ID or request body

delete.description: Deletes a comet by its ID. User must be the owner.

get.description: Retrieves a single observation by its ID.

parameters.description: ID of the observation to update
parameters.name: observation_id

parameters.description: Updated timestamp in RFC3339 format (if using multipart)
parameters.name: observed_at

parameters.description: Updated Right Ascension in degrees (if using multipart)
parameters.name: right_ascension

parameters.description: Updated Declination in degrees (if using multipart)
parameters.name: declination

parameters.description: New image for the observation (if using multipart)
parameters.name: image

400.description: Invalid request data or observation ID

delete.description: Deletes an observation by its ID.

parameters.description: ID of the observation to delete
parameters.name: observation_id

get.description: Retrieves the profile information for the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Updates the profile information (username, password, avatar) for the currently authenticated user.

parameters.description: Profile data to update (if using JSON)
parameters.name: updateRequest

400.description: Invalid request body or form data

approach_date.description: --- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ ЗДЕСЬ: Поля из CloseApproach добавлены напрямую ---
